traits.name: Skills requiring dexterity
traits.description: High manual dexterity — used by Morphus characteristics and attribute penalties that target dexterity-dependent skills.

traits.name: Skills requiring a light touch
traits.description: Fine manipulation and careful handling — separate book list from dexterity skills.

membershipNotes.locksmith: Listed in the dexterity source file but not yet present in palladiumSkills.json; add skillTraits when the catalog row exists.
membershipNotes.facadePpPenalties: Optional low facade P.P. penalties map to requires_dexterity / requires_light_touch via facadePpSkillTraitPenalties.ts (ported from v0 highManualDexterity / otherManualDexterity).
